creator: reg@shale.csir.co.za
text:
Upgrade to gnome-objc-0.99.3.  Cleanup CONFIGURE_ENV.  Add impilict
	depends.  4.0-CURRENT support.  Lots of Makefile.in changes caused
	by new automake.

	Tests for -lc_r removed since the code does not use pthreads and
	does not support the libc_r instead of libc model.
